title: myoporum glabrum
intro: Myoporum glabrum, also known as Bois de rose or Sweet Broom, is a small, flowering shrub native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, thanks to its flavonoids and saponins content. The health benefits of Myoporum glabrum include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
